data.content: Implementation review approved. Single-file change to .github/workflows/release.yml: (1) bumped actions/download-artifact from v5 to v7 (node24) across 3 steps, preserving name/path inputs; (2) replaced softprops/action-gh-release@v2 (node20) with semantically equivalent gh release create shell step — tag, title, generated notes, and uploaded assets match exactly. No remaining node20 actions in the release path. No changes to release semantics, build jobs, or other workflows. Scope correctly limited to workflow-only updates.
